Director_Name: The name of the director of sales operations.
Company_Name: The name of the company where the director works.
Year: The year when the report was generated.
Total_Reports: The total number of comprehensive sales reports generated by the director and their team.
Monthly_Reports: The number of monthly sales reports generated by the director and their team.
Quarterly_Analyses: The number of quarterly strategic analyses generated by the director and their team.
